executives.name: Enric Asunción Escorsa
executives.background: Mr. Asunción is one of our co-founders and has served as our Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our board of directors since our inception in 2015. Previously, Mr. Asunción worked at Tesla, Inc. as a Charging Installations Program Manager from June 2014 to June 2015. Before that, he worked at Applus+ IDIADA as an Electric Vehicle Charging Engineer from July 2011 to June 2014.

executives.name: Luis Boada
executives.background: Mr. Boada has served as our Chief Financial Officer since May 2024. Prior to joining Wallbox, Mr. Boada served as the Chief Financial Officer of Fluidra, S.A. from 2022 to 2024. Before that, he spent 18 years at Goodman Group in various senior financial roles.

executives.name: Eduard Castañeda Mañé
executives.background: Mr. Castañeda is one of our co-founders and has served as our Chief Product Officer since 2015. He was also a member of our board of directors until 2023. Previously, he was a co-founder and engineer at several technology startups.

executives.name: Jordi Lainz
executives.background: Mr. Lainz served as our Chief Financial Officer from 2018 until May 2024, and now serves as Corporate Director. Previously, he was the CFO of Eurofred Group and held various financial positions at several multinational companies.

board_of_directors.name: Enric Asunción Escorsa
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder and CEO of Wallbox. Previously at Tesla and Applus+ IDIADA.

board_of_directors.name: Anders Pettersson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Pettersson has served as a non-executive director since 2021. He was previously the CEO of Thule Group and has held various board positions at companies like ZetaDisplay AB and Purem GmbH.

board_of_directors.name: Beatriz González
board_of_directors.background: Ms. González is the founder and Managing Partner of Seaya Ventures. She has served on our board since 2021 and previously served on the boards of Cabify and Glovo.

board_of_directors.name: Diego Diaz Pilas
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Diaz is the Global Head of Ventures & Technology at Iberdrola. He has served as a non-executive director since 2021.

board_of_directors.name: Pol Soler
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Soler is the CEO of Quadis, a leading Spanish car dealership network. He has served as a non-executive director since 2021.

board_of_directors.name: Donna Kinzel
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Kinzel was previously the CFO of Ursuline Academy and held senior financial roles at Pepco Holdings. She joined the board in 2022.

board_of_directors.name: César Ruipérez
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ruipérez is a Director at Iberdrola and has extensive experience in investment banking and corporate development. He joined the board in 2023.

sources.source_description: Form 20-F Annual Report for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
